name: Basic Vegetable Platter
recipeIngredient: 2 cups soft lettuce leaves (Boston or similar; not iceberg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel cucumber lengthwise into strips, alternating green and white sections, then cut each strip in half lengthwise and slice horizontally into thin pieces, forming semi-circles.
2. Arrange a mound of lettuce at the center of a platter.
3. Place separate mounds of mint and coriander around the lettuce.
4. Position cucumber slices overlapping along the outer rim of the platter.
This basic vegetable platter arrangement can be completed with additional vegetables as needed for specific recipes. It serves 8 portions.
